# GitHub Templates

This folder contains the **issue and PR templates** auto-loaded by GitHub when contributors open issues or pull requests on the [GenAI Engineering Hub](../).

## Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug-report.md`](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug-report.md) | Bug report template |
| [`ISSUE_TEMPLATE/content-proposal.md`](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/content-proposal.md) | Content proposal template (new model, new method, new paper) |
| [`PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`](PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md) | Pull request template |

> **Note:** This `README.md` is rendered by GitHub when you browse the `.github/` folder. The hub's main entry point is [`/README.md`](../README.md) at the repository root.
